title: antidesma pleuricum
intro: Antidesma pleuricum, also known as the velvet-back or velvet-leafed Antidesma, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, Antidesma pleuricum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antidesma pleuricum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
